benchmark.name: Bioinformatics Iterative Loop Benchmark
benchmark.description: Machine-readable benchmark for evaluating a conversational bioinformatics analysis system as a stateful iterative data workspace with artifact persistence, lineage, approval loops, plot iteration, scientific bug-fixing, and reproducibility support.

turn_results.user: Analyze this RNA-seq dataset and tell me what is going on.
turn_results.text:
**Helix understood your request as: Bulk RNA-seq differential expression analysis**

Performs differential expression analysis on raw count data. Models main effects, interactions, and multi-factor experimental designs.

Before Helix can execute this analysis, the following inputs are needed:

### Required inputs
| Parameter | Description | Example |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| `count_matrix` | Raw count matrix — genes as rows, samples as columns (CSV or TSV). | `s3://your-bucket/counts.csv` |
| `sample_metadata` | Sample annotation table — one row per sample with factor columns (CSV or TSV). | `s3://your-bucket/metadata.csv` |

### Optional inputs
| Parameter | Description | Example |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| `design_formula` | R-style model formula (default: ~c

turn_results.user: I also want to know whether batch effects are strong.

turn_results.text:
**Helix understood your request as: Single-cell RNA-seq analysis**

Performs full scRNA-seq analysis: QC, normalization (SCTransform), dimensionality reduction (PCA/UMAP), clustering (Leiden), cell-type annotation, and differential expression between conditions.

Before Helix can execute this analysis, the following inputs are needed:

### Required inputs
| Parameter | Description | Example |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| `data_file` | Path to the gene-expression matrix. Accepted formats: 10x HDF5 (.h5), AnnData (.h5ad), Seurat RDS (.rds), Cell Ranger output directory (matrix.mtx + barcodes + features), or a plain count CSV. | `s3://your-bucket/sample_cellranger_out/filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5` |

### Optional inputs
| Parameter | Description | Example |
|-----------|----------
